message: 🌱 Add werf: Forward values with werf image path to subcharts mission (#711)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "werf-3411-forward-values-with-werf-image-path-to-subcharts",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "werf: Forward values with werf image path to subcharts",
+    "description": "Forward values with werf image path to subcharts. Requested by 38+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current werf deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your werf version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n werf -l app.kubernetes.io/name=werf
helm list -n werf 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working werf installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review werf configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant werf configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n werf -l app.kubernetes.io/name=werf
kubectl get configmap -n werf -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=werf
```
Use custom parameters in dependencies list in parent `Chart.yaml` for forward value with image path to subchart

For example:
```
apiVersion: v2
name: parentChart
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
- name: subChart
  version: 1.0.0
  repository:"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Forward values with werf image path to subcharts",
+        "description": "Exposing werf service values (including `$.Values.werf.image`) to the subchart is now possible with:
```yaml
.helm/requirements.yaml
------------------------------------------------------
dependencies:
- name: subchart
  version: 1.0.0
  export-values:
  - parent: werf
    child: werf
```
In the
```yaml
apiVersion: v2
name: parentChart
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
- name: subChart
  version: 1.0.0
  repository: https://charts.flant.com
  condition: subchart.enabled
  alias: subchart
  werfAllowImages:
  - frontend
  - backend
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade werf to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade werf:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade werf werf/werf --namespace werf
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n werf
helm list -n werf
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n werf -l app.kubernetes.io/name=werf
kubectl get events -n werf --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Forward values with werf image path to subcharts" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Exposing werf service values (including `$.Values.werf.image`) to the subchart is now possible with:
```yaml
.helm/requirements.yaml
------------------------------------------------------
dependencies:
- name: subchart
  version: 1.0.0
  export-values:
  - parent: werf
    child: werf
```
In the subchart:
```yaml
  image: {{ $.Values.werf.image.imagename }}
```
`export-values` can also be used to",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: v2
name: parentChart
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
- name: subChart
  version: 1.0.0
  repository: https://charts.flant.com
  condition: subchart.enabled
  alias: subchart
  werfAllowImages:
  - frontend
  - backend",
+        ".helm/requirements.yaml
------------------------------------------------------
dependencies:
- name: subchart
  version: 1.0.0
  export-values:
  - parent: werf
    child: werf",
+        "image: {{ $.Values.werf.image.imagename }}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+      "pr": "https://github.com/werf/werf/pull/3667"
+    },
